mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: increased body weight, hypertension, hirsutism, moon facies, episodic hypersomnia, secondary hypercortisolism

medullary thyroid carcinoma, papillary thyroid carcinoma, marfanoid habitus, pectorus excavatum, and skeletal findings such as scoliosis and kyphoscoliosis
proteinuria, purpuric rashes, acroparesthesias, corneal opacities, and angiotensin converting enzyme deficiency

short stature, dysostosis multiplex with narrow thorax, lumbar lordosis, and coarse faces
café au lait macules, precocious puberty, polyostotic fibro-osseous lesions, and endocrine overactivity
hepatosplenomegaly, neurological symptoms including cognitive decline, myopathy, and peripheral neuropathy
